calendar.description: MCP server for calendar operations (availability checking and event creation)

tasks.description: MCP server for task management (create, update, list, and duplicate checking)

notes.description: MCP server for notes management (search and save meeting notes)

workspace.description: MCP server for Google Workspace (create Docs, search Drive, send Gmail)

competition_note: 4 MCP servers: Tasks, Calendar, Notes, and Google Workspace. All servers wrap real operations — Tasks/Calendar/Notes target PostgreSQL, Workspace targets Google APIs (Docs, Drive, Gmail) via ADC.
